content.text:
{
  "execute": false,
  "dryRun": true,
  "routeId": "put_notes-book-id-share",
  "method": "PUT",
  "path": "/notes/{book_id}/share",
  "url": "https://www.goodreads.com/notes/48526390/share",
  "mutatesAccount": true,
  "requiresCookie": true,
  "requiresCsrf": true,
  "auth": {
    "cookieEnv": "GOODREADS_COOKIE",
    "csrfEnv": "GOODREADS_CSRF_TOKEN",
    "cookiePresent": false,
    "csrfPresent": false
  },
  "bodyMode": "none",
  "riskLevel": "write-mutate"
}
